title: One Day
description:
Dive into an adventure full of dungeons and big machines around the world.
Your story begins here!
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f932bfd4f6c89e5bf5c5db61e02fc34be3516c58_0.webp)

# **ENGLISH**
**Embark on an unparalleled odyssey through unexplored worlds.**

Our server offers you a unique experience where technology and dungeons intertwine.
Build sophisticated machines, explore the depths of space, cultivate exotic crops and confront never-before-seen creatures.

Dive into treasure-filled dungeons and experience unforgettable adventures!

# **ESPAÑOL**
**Embárcate en una odisea sin igual a través de mundos inexplorados.**

Nuestro servidor te ofrece una experiencia única donde la tecnología y las mazmorras se entrelazan.
Construye sofisticadas máquinas, explora las profundidades del espacio, cultiva exóticos cultivos y enfréntate a criaturas nunca antes vistas.

¡Sumérgete en mazmorras repletas de tesoros y vive aventuras inolvidables!


![dc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f002e57f1e1acb27e9757fff4ffa3c83a93796f5.png)       **Tenemos Discord :D**
